Led..Chill: The Ledum patient is very often subject to what may be called constitutional coldness, coldness to touch, coldness in the lady and coldness in the extremities with hot head.
Led..Extremities: Rheumatic and gouty extremities with pain and swelling; pain worse from motion, worse at night and from warmth of bed; better from cold applications with copious pale urine. The pains and swelling go upwards and the heart becomes affected.
Led..Extremities, coldness: coldness to touch, coldness in the lady and coldness in the extremities with hot head
Led..Generalities: There is throbbing and pulsating all over the body; the skin is purple or is too highly colored; he wants the covers all off at night.
Led..Head: It is not uncommon to hear a patient, who has a Ledum headache, say that she wants the head out in the cold air, wants to put it out of the window, does not want any covering upon the head; delights to bathe it with very cold water.
Led..Mind: He had been for several years unwilling to work, having lost his ambition, and he would sit in the house and allow his wife to wait upon him. He had practically become a tramp, only he could not tramp.
Led..Skin: the skin is purple or is too highly colored
Led..Sleep: he wants the covers all off at night
Led..Generalities, pain: wounds that bleed scantily but are followed by pain, puffiness and coldness of the part
Led..Clinical: Ledum counteracts the effect of whiskey, and takes away the appetite for whiskey. Ledum is to whiskey what Caladium is to the smoking habit.
Led..Heart & Circulation: The pains and swelling go upwards and the heart becomes affected.
Led..Face: The face I have already described as puffy or bloated like the Lachesis face. It is a besotted face and looks very much like the face of an old drunkard.
Led..Head, pain: It is not uncommon to hear a patient, who has a Ledum headache, say that she wants the head out in the cold air, wants to put it out of the window, does not want any covering upon the head; delights to bathe it with very cold water.
Led..Generalities, heat: the whole body is overheated, and the head also is in a state of great heat. There is throbbing and pulsating all over the body; the skin is purple or is too highly colored; he wants the covers all off at night.
Led..Generalities, bones: having complaints in persons who suffer from gout, and have chalk stones in their joints, deposits in the wrists, fingers and toes.
Led..Generalities, bones, pain: The gouty joints become suddenly inflamed and are relieved by cold.
Led..Extremities, pain: Rheumatic and gouty extremities with pain and swelling; pain worse from motion, worse at night and from warmth of bed; better from cold applications with copious pale urine.
Led..Extremities, pain, lower limbs: bloated and purple from the knees down in certain dropsical conditions. With this purple, mottled, bloated condition from the knees to the feet the swelling as big as the skin will allow, and the pain excruciating.
Led..Extremities, swelling: Ledum has a bloated condition of the hands, face, and feet; bloated and purple from the knees down in certain dropsical conditions. With this purple, mottled, bloated condition from the knees to the feet the swelling as big as the skin will allow.
Led..Eye: Hemorrhages sometimes occur in the chamber of the eye.
